headline: Assessing News Corp (NWSA) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
summary: Event context and recent share performance News (NWSA) has been in focus after recent trading left the stock with mixed short term returns, including a roughly flat move over the past week and a negative move over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for News. At a share price of US$24.48, the recent 1 month share price return of 3.29% contrasts with a weaker year to date share price return of a 6.53% decline and a 3 year total shareholder return of 44.72%.
